title: cyperus constanzae
intro: Cyperus constanzae, also known as Constance's cyperus or Constance's flatsedge, is a type of aquatic plant native to tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus constanzae are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which are often used to treat various ailments in folk medicine.
